emails.subject: Free homepage sample for Sunshine Learning Center
emails.body:
Hi Maria,

I noticed Sunshine Learning Center doesn't have a website yet.

I build websites for daycares - here's my offer:

I'll create a sample homepage for you, free, within 48 hours.

Look it over. If you want to keep it, $50/month. If not, nothing owed.

Just reply "yes" and I'll get started.

Valley Daycare Sites
contact@valleydaycaresites.com

emails.subject: Quick question about Little Blessings Daycare
emails.body:

I was looking at Little Blessings online and noticed something...

Your website works, but it's outdated and doesn't show well on phones.

Mind if I build you a sample homepage to show you what I mean? Free, 48 hours, no strings attached.

If you like it - $50/month. If not - you walk away, no charge.
